# Nick Rae

> Commercial pilot and aviation workbook author based in Merced, CA. Publishing FAA-aligned pilot study workbooks on Amazon KDP while building side income to fund flight hours toward a flying career.

## About

Nick Rae is a Commercial Instrument Multi-Engine rated pilot with 389.4 flight hours, working toward 500 hours for Part 135 and eventually 1,500 hours for ATP certification. His main public product lane is FAA-aligned aviation study material on Amazon KDP, including Clearance to Confidence: VFR Radio Calls Workbook. He also builds iOS apps and documents the Flight Funded experiment at nickrae.net. The OpenClaw playbook remains available but is a background builder lane, not the primary offer.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nickrae.net/)
- [Blog](https://nickrae.net/blog/)
- [Flight Funded](https://nickrae.net/flight-funded/) — tracking flight hours and KDP aviation royalties: 90 March-June aviation workbook units, $775.14 USD + €25.29 EUR through the June 24, 2026 dashboard
- [Aviation Pilot Workbooks](https://nickrae.net/aviation-workbooks/) — FAA-aligned workbooks for private pilot, instrument, commercial, multi-engine, and VFR radio calls
- [The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook](https://nickrae.net/openclaw-playbook/) — background AI-automation playbook, not the current lead offer
- [FeedFare](https://nickrae.net/feedfare/) — trade steps for screen time (iOS)
- [Inflection Point](https://nickrae.net/inflection-point/) — personal growth OS with a 3-day access preview, free plan, and optional $14.99 lifetime unlock

## Apps

- [FeedFare — Trade Steps for Screen Time](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/feedfare/id6758923557) — step-to-screen tracking for better phone habits
- Inflection Point — personal growth OS with 3-day access preview and optional $14.99 lifetime unlock

## Current Revenue Proof

- KDP aviation workbook dashboard through June 24, 2026: 90 March-June aviation workbook units, $775.14 USD + €25.29 EUR. June MTD dashboard export shows 28 aviation units, $248.27 USD + €15.88 EUR, 0 refunds, 637 KENP, Instrument leading royalty dollars, and PPL carrying the strongest unit lane.
- Kalshi weather bot remains paused/gated until calibration earns trust.

## Background Digital Products

- [The Non-Developer's OpenClaw Playbook](https://nicholasrae.gumroad.com/l/openclaw-playbook) — 163-page guide plus Starter Kit ZIP for building AI-agent workflows, automations, audits, and content pipelines without writing code. Background offer while KDP aviation workbooks carry the main buyer path.
